easy.title: Build a Session-Based Countdown Timer
easy.description: Create a countdown timer that starts when the page is loaded and persists across page refreshes within the same tab. The timer should show the remaining time and reset when the tab is closed and reopened.

</head>

</body>
</html>

medium.title: Session-Based Shopping Cart with Guest-to-Login Transfer
medium.description: Build a shopping cart that stores items in sessionStorage for guest users. When the user 'logs in', the session cart items are transferred to a user account (simulated localStorage), and the session cart is cleared.
medium.starterCode:

hard.title: Session-Aware Multi-Tab Form with Conflict Detection
hard.description: Build a collaborative document editor where multiple tabs (same user, same browser) can edit the same document. Use localStorage for persistence and sessionStorage for per-tab metadata. Implement conflict detection when two tabs try to edit the same field.
hard.starterCode:

</html>
